title: oreocome involucellata
intro: Oreocome involucellata, also known as Himalayan orocome, is a flowering plant species native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oreocome involucellata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress. Oreocome involucellata can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and has also been used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine preparations.
